requirement_topic.en: Guinea Grid Connection — EDG Acceptance, IEC 62116 Anti-Islanding, IEC 61727 Interconnection, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 几内亚并网——EDG接受、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727互联及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 幾內亞併網——EDG接受、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727互聯及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: For grid-tied solar PV projects in Guinea, the practical gate is EDG and project-owner acceptance of the connection design. A publicly accessible EDG inverter technical specification equivalent to Qatar's Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1 could not be confirmed. In the absence of a confirmed Guinea inverter-specific list, bankable projects commonly need IEC-based evidence: IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility interface, relevant IEC 61000 harmonic and power-quality evidence, protection settings, commissioning tests, and a grid-code / connection study agreed with EDG or the appointed network engineer. Guinea commonly uses 220/380 V, 50 Hz distribution parameters; firmware and protection relay settings should be validated for the actual EDG connection point, not assumed from China factory defaults.
summary.zh: 对于几内亚并网太阳能光伏项目，实际门槛是EDG及项目业主对接入设计的接受。未能确认公开可获取、类似卡塔尔Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的EDG逆变器技术规格。在未确认几内亚逆变器专门清单的情况下，可融资项目通常需要IEC证据：IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口、相关IEC 61000谐波和电能质量证据、保护整定、调试测试，以及经EDG或指定电网工程师同意的电网规范/接入研究。几内亚配电参数通常为220/380 V、50 Hz；固件和保护继电器整定应针对实际EDG接入点验证，而非沿用中国出厂默认值。
summary.zht: 對於幾內亞併網太陽能光伏項目，實際門檻是EDG及項目業主對接入設計的接受。未能確認公開可取得、類似卡達Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的EDG逆變器技術規格。在未確認幾內亞逆變器專門清單的情況下，可融資項目通常需要IEC證據：IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網接口、相關IEC 61000諧波和電能品質證據、保護整定、調試測試，以及經EDG或指定電網工程師同意的電網規範/接入研究。幾內亞配電參數通常為220/380 V、50 Hz；韌體和保護繼電器整定應針對實際EDG接入點驗證，而非沿用中國出廠預設值。

standards_or_laws: EDG project-specific grid-connection approval and commissioning requirements (public inverter-specific specification not confirmed)
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality test methods where specified by EDG, EPC, owner, lender, or donor documents
Guinea low-voltage distribution context — commonly 220/380 V, 50 Hz; confirm final voltage and protection settings at the EDG connection point

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, domestic anti-islanding results, and factory firmware settings based on China 50 Hz 220/380 V distribution conditions. These documents support China grid-operator submissions but do not automatically transfer to EDG acceptance in Guinea. Guinea project stakeholders may require IEC reports, French-language documentation, site-specific protection studies, and commissioning records instead of China-only GB/T or NB/T certificates.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、国内防孤岛结果，以及基于中国50 Hz 220/380 V配电条件的出厂固件设置。上述文件支持中国电网运营商提交，但不能自动转移为几内亚EDG接受。几内亚项目相关方可能要求IEC报告、法语文件、现场特定保护研究和调试记录，而非仅限中国GB/T或NB/T证书。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、國內防孤島結果，以及基於中國50 Hz 220/380 V配電條件的出廠韌體設置。上述文件支持中國電網運營商提交，但不能自動轉移為幾內亞EDG接受。幾內亞項目相關方可能要求IEC報告、法語文件、現場特定保護研究和調試記錄，而非僅限中國GB/T或NB/T證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid certificates do not establish EDG grid-connection approval in Guinea. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, harmonic / power-quality reports, a protection-settings file, and a commissioning test plan for the specific EDG connection point. Confirm whether the project is utility-scale, mining self-supply, mini-grid, rural electrification, or behind-the-meter, because the authority, concession, PPA, and commissioning documents may differ. Humidity, Harmattan dust, weak-grid operation, and diesel/hydro hybrid interactions should be included in the settings and derating review.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证书不能证明几内亚EDG并网批准。出口商应针对具体EDG接入点准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、谐波/电能质量报告、保护整定文件和调试测试计划。应确认项目属于公用事业规模、矿山自备电、微电网、农村电气化还是用户侧项目，因为主管机关、特许权、购电协议和调试文件可能不同。湿度、哈马丹粉尘、弱电网运行以及柴油/水电混合互动应纳入设置和降额审查。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證書不能證明幾內亞EDG併網批准。出口商應針對具體EDG接入點準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網接口證據、諧波/電能品質報告、保護整定文件和調試測試計畫。應確認項目屬於公用事業規模、礦山自備電、微電網、農村電氣化還是用戶側項目，因為主管機關、特許權、購電協議和調試文件可能不同。濕度、哈馬丹粉塵、弱電網運行以及柴油/水電混合互動應納入設置和降額審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for any EDG-connected or project-financed grid-tied installation; exact Guinea inverter-specific regulation and ARSEE-Guinea role should be confirmed for the project route
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China grid-operator submissions but does not transfer automatically to EDG Guinea connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EDG connection approval and project-owner acceptance as separate gates from China domestic grid certificates. Prepare IEC 62116, IEC 61727, harmonic / power-quality, protection-settings, and commissioning evidence for Guinea's 50 Hz grid and the actual connection point. Verify the competent electricity regulator name, EDG requirements, licence route, and current grid-connection documents directly before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将EDG接入批准和项目业主接受视为独立于中国国内并网证书的门槛。请针对几内亚50 Hz电网和实际接入点准备IEC 62116、IEC 61727、谐波/电能质量、保护整定和调试证据。出货前请直接核实主管电力监管机构名称、EDG要求、许可路径和现行并网文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將EDG接入批准和項目業主接受視為獨立於中國國內併網證書的門檻。請針對幾內亞50 Hz電網和實際接入點準備IEC 62116、IEC 61727、諧波/電能品質、保護整定和調試證據。出貨前請直接核實主管電力監管機構名稱、EDG要求、許可路徑和現行併網文件。

requirement_topic.en: Guinea Project Route — Utility, Mining, Rural Electrification, Donor, and Lender Connection Gates
requirement_topic.zh: 几内亚项目路径——公用事业、矿业、农村电气化、捐助方和贷款方接入门槛
requirement_topic.zht: 幾內亞項目路徑——公用事業、礦業、農村電氣化、捐助方和貸款方接入門檻

summary.en: Guinea's solar PV market includes donor-financed rural electrification, mining and industrial self-supply, and emerging grid-connected IPP projects. The Khoumagueli solar project has been publicly described as a 40 MWp IPP selling power to EDG, illustrating that project-specific PPA, concession, lender, and EDG interface documents can be decisive. For inverters, the compliance package may therefore be driven less by a published national inverter list and more by project documents requiring IEC reports, French-language manuals, factory acceptance tests, site acceptance tests, spares, tropicalisation, and weak-grid performance settings.
summary.zh: 几内亚太阳能光伏市场包括捐助方融资的农村电气化、矿业和工业自备电，以及正在发展的并网IPP项目。公开资料将Khoumagueli太阳能项目描述为向EDG售电的40 MWp IPP，说明项目特定的购电协议、特许权、贷款方和EDG接口文件可能具有决定性作用。因此，对于逆变器，合规包可能更多由项目文件驱动，要求IEC报告、法语手册、工厂验收测试、现场验收测试、备件、热带化和弱电网性能设置，而不是由已公布的国家逆变器清单驱动。
summary.zht: 幾內亞太陽能光伏市場包括捐助方融資的農村電氣化、礦業和工業自備電，以及正在發展的併網IPP項目。公開資料將Khoumagueli太陽能項目描述為向EDG售電的40 MWp IPP，說明項目特定的購電協議、特許權、貸款方和EDG接口文件可能具有決定性作用。因此，對於逆變器，合規包可能更多由項目文件驅動，要求IEC報告、法語手冊、工廠驗收測試、現場驗收測試、備件、熱帶化和弱電網性能設置，而不是由已公布的國家逆變器清單驅動。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific PPA, concession, EPC, lender, donor, and EDG interconnection documents
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 where specified for utility-interconnected PV inverters
EDG or appointed grid engineer protection coordination and commissioning requirements
French-language technical documentation where required by purchaser, authority, lender, or site operator

summary.en: Chinese distributed and utility PV approvals are based on China NEA policy, State Grid / Southern Power Grid procedures, GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021. Those approvals do not establish a Guinea PPA, concession, EDG interface agreement, donor procurement eligibility, or lender technical acceptance. Chinese documentation may need reformatting into a project evidence matrix with IEC cross-references and French or bilingual operating documents.
summary.zh: 中国分布式和公用事业光伏审批基于中国国家能源局政策、国家电网/南方电网程序、GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021。上述审批不能证明几内亚购电协议、特许权、EDG接口协议、捐助方采购资格或贷款方技术接受。中国文件可能需要重新整理为带IEC交叉引用的项目证据矩阵，并提供法语或双语运行文件。
summary.zht: 中國分散式和公用事業光伏審批基於中國國家能源局政策、國家電網/南方電網程序、GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021。上述審批不能證明幾內亞購電協議、特許權、EDG接口協議、捐助方採購資格或貸款方技術接受。中國文件可能需要重新整理為帶IEC交叉引用的項目證據矩陣，並提供法語或雙語運行文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China-compliant inverter package may still fail Guinea project acceptance if it lacks the donor/lender forms, French documentation, site-specific firmware file, weak-grid ride-through assumptions, humidity and dust derating, or EDG commissioning evidence required by the contract. For mining and industrial loads, confirm whether the inverter operates islanded, grid-parallel, diesel-hybrid, hydro-linked, or behind-the-meter, because anti-islanding and grid-support settings can change materially.
gap.zh: 差距：即使逆变器符合中国要求，如果缺少合同要求的捐助方/贷款方表格、法语文件、现场特定固件文件、弱电网穿越假设、湿度和粉尘降额或EDG调试证据，仍可能无法通过几内亚项目接受。对于矿业和工业负荷，应确认逆变器是孤网、并网并列、柴光混合、水电联动还是用户侧运行，因为防孤岛和电网支撑设置可能发生重大变化。
gap.zht: 差距：即使逆變器符合中國要求，如果缺少合約要求的捐助方/貸款方表格、法語文件、現場特定韌體文件、弱電網穿越假設、濕度和粉塵降額或EDG調試證據，仍可能無法通過幾內亞項目接受。對於礦業和工業負荷，應確認逆變器是孤網、併網並列、柴光混合、水電聯動還是用戶側運行，因為防孤島和電網支撐設置可能發生重大變化。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where imposed by PPA, concession, EDG interconnection, EPC, lender, donor, mining customer, or commissioning documents; public national inverter list not confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese approvals and certificates are domestic evidence only and do not establish Guinea project finance or EDG acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a Guinea project evidence matrix from the PPA, EDG interface, EPC specification, and donor/lender clauses before relying on Chinese grid certificates. IEC evidence, French documentation, site commissioning records, and environmental derating may be decisive even where no public Guinea inverter-specific rule is available. Confirm the current legal and utility gate with the project company, EDG, and competent ministry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在依赖中国并网证书前，应根据购电协议、EDG接口、EPC规格和捐助方/贷款方条款建立几内亚项目证据矩阵。即使没有公开的几内亚逆变器专门规则，IEC证据、法语文件、现场调试记录和环境降额也可能具有决定性作用。请向项目公司、EDG和主管部委确认现行法律和公用事业门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在依賴中國併網證書前，應根據購電協議、EDG接口、EPC規格和捐助方/貸款方條款建立幾內亞項目證據矩陣。即使沒有公開的幾內亞逆變器專門規則，IEC證據、法語文件、現場調試記錄和環境降額也可能具有決定性作用。請向項目公司、EDG和主管部委確認現行法律和公用事業門檻。
